title: Savory Zanzibari Tomato Stir-fry
description: A salty and velvety savory dish featuring English muffins, sautéed in a midnight-craving Kenyan style. Perfect for those on the keto-friendly diet.

ingredients.name: English muffins
ingredients.notes: Use keto-friendly or gluten-free varieties if necessary.

ingredients.name: Onions
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely for better flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Minced to add a robust garlic kick.

instructions: Slice the English muffins into thin rounds or flat pieces.
On a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onions and garlic, sauté for about 2 minutes until translucent.
Add tomatoes to the skillet with their juice. Season with salt, black pepper, and allow them to cook down slightly to release more flavor.
Once all ingredients are well combined in the skillet, reduce heat to low-medium. Mix in oven-heated English muffins evenly into the tomato mixture for about 3-5 minutes until they're heated through.
Transfer the entire mixture onto a serving dish and serve immediately.
